description: Abstract interaction primitives for CairnCode. Anchors stay few; reusable emphasis states derive from them before platform calibration.

cursor.description: Primary live cursor and accent signal.

status.description: Persistent emphasis band used for status presence and release accents.

focusRing.description: Focusable edge signal used for ring and border emphasis.

lineEmphasis.description: Current-line substrate emphasis without becoming a spotlight.

listHover.description: Hover substrate for navigational lists and tabs.
